creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you please make sure of the following:

1) Kernel, world, and /usr/src/sys all in sync and from the same build
2) upgrade your ports tree, as there is a later LSOF in it.

kernel, world, and /usr/src/ must all be in sync for lsof to compile
correctly.

Thanks!

-- 
Larry Rosenman                     http://www.lerctr.org/~ler
